name: Sitronix Technology Corporation
summary: Sitronix Technology Corporation, a fabless semiconductor company, offers display driver integrated circuits (ICs) and memory for entry-level mobile phones, industrial displays, and automotive systems. The company offers mobile display driver ICs, industrial display driver ICs, automotive display driver ICs, projected capacitive touch controller ICs, and medium-size TFT-LCD driver ICs, as well as alternator regulators. Sitronix Technology Corporation was incorporated in 1992 and is headquartered in Zhubei City, Taiwan.
